data.title: OKX will launch BABY (Babylon) spot trading and delivery BABY pre-market trading contracts
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX will soon launch BABY (Babylon), the specific schedule is as follows:
Online time BABY open deposit time: April 9th ​​8:00 pm (UTC+8)
BABY call auction time: April 10th 5:15 to 6:15 pm (UTC+8)
BABY/USDT spot trading opening time: April 10th 6:15 pm (UTC+8)
BABY open withdrawal time: April 11th 6:00 pm (UTC+8)

data.title: Greeks.live: Most traders expect Bitcoin to continue to fall to $69,000-70,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live released a community briefing, pointing out that the community mainly holds a bearish stance, and most traders expect Bitcoin to continue to fall to $69,000-70,000, but some members believe that it has bottomed out or is close to bottoming out. Market participants are closely watching the escalating tariffs and their impact on global markets. As the technical trend has not yet been broken, the community consensus expects Bitcoin prices to continue to fall, and most people believe that its target price will be around $69,000-70,000. Some members are actively selling call options at the $80-84,000 level to take advantage of the current volatility and downward trend.

data.title: EU and US Discuss Tariff Reduction Parameters
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market sources indicate that the European Union's trade representative has engaged in discussions with the United States regarding the parameters for reducing tariffs. This dialogue aims to address trade barriers and enhance economic cooperation between the two regions. The discussions are part of ongoing efforts to improve trade relations and foster mutual economic benefits.

data.title: Binance to launch non-stablecoin margin asset LDUSDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance is about to launch LDUSDT for users of its crypto futures trading platform. It is also the second rewarded margin asset launched by Binance after the launch of BFUSD in November last year. Users can now trade futures, use LDUSDT and earn rewards through locked USDT. It is reported that LDUSDT is Binance’s latest move to combine yield generation with trading liquidity after BFUSD. ((The Block)

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched projects AGAWA, Steve, jockey
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched Solana ecosystem’s MEME tokens AGAWA, Steve, and jockey.

data.title: ECB Official Dismisses Rate Cut Proposal Amid Trade Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, European Central Bank (ECB) Governing Council member Robert Holzmann has stated that there is currently no justification for a rate cut. Holzmann emphasized that trade issues, rather than interest rate levels, are hindering investment. He expressed confidence that the eurozone is unlikely to face a recession, although growth may slow down. Holzmann dismissed the proposal for a significant rate cut of 50 basis points as absurd.

data.title: ECB board member Holzmann: Proposal for 50 basis point rate cut is absurd
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: European Central Bank board member Holzmann said that he does not think there is a reason to cut interest rates at present. It is trade rather than interest rates that inhibit investment. The eurozone is unlikely to fall into recession, but growth may weaken. The proposal to cut interest rates by 50 basis points is ridiculous. (Jinshi)

data.title: BTC/USDT,ETH/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, SOL/USDT, XRP/USDT aand DOGE/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume.BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.14, funding rate: 0.0006%.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.55 , funding rate: 0.0017%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.65, funding rate: 0.0029%.XRP/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.65, funding rate: -0.0086%.DOGE/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.12, funding rate: 0.0031%.

data.title: Spot gold rose to $3,060/oz, up 2.60% on the day
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that spot gold has reached $3,060/ounce, up 2.60% on the day. New York gold futures rose 3.00% on the day and are now at $3,080.00/ounce. (Gold Ten)

data.title: OKX will launch PARTI/USD trading pair
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, the USD trading area under OKX spot trading will add the following USD trading pair: PARTI/USD at 4:30 pm on April 10, 2025 (UTC+8).
